options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <blackBoxCellName> # name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -cap
options.description: Specifies the capacitance value in picoFarad

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of library cell from which DRVs are inferred

options.name: -max_trans
options.description: Specifies the maximum transition value in nanoseconds

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of pin from which DRVs are inferred

options.name: -port
options.description: Specifies the name of the clock port on which to set the value
